# sui-pilot

> Documentation copilot for AI agents working with Sui blockchain, Move language, Walrus storage, Seal secrets management, the Sui TypeScript SDK, and the Sui Prover.

This repository bundles ~715 documentation files across six ecosystems, designed for AI agent consumption via `Glob` and `Grep`.

## Docs

- [Sui blockchain docs](.sui-docs/): 339 MDX files — concepts, guides, references, on-chain finance
- [Move Book docs](.move-book-docs/): 143 files — language tutorial + reference (syntax, types, abilities, idioms)
- [Walrus storage docs](.walrus-docs/): 84 MDX files — blob storage, Walrus Sites, SDK, operators
- [Seal secrets docs](.seal-docs/): 14 MDX files — encryption, key servers, access control
- [TypeScript SDK docs](.ts-sdk-docs/): 115 MDX files — dapp-kit, payment-kit, kiosk, transactions, SDK 2.0 migration
- [Sui Prover docs](.sui-prover-docs/): 20 files — `guide/` (SKILL.md + spec-reference.md), `sources/` (prover.move, ghost.move construct definitions), `examples/` (worked specs from `asymptotic-code/sui-kit`)

## How to Use

Read `agents/sui-pilot-agent.md` first — it routes topics to corpora. Then `Glob` for filenames and `Grep` for content within the matching `.<source>-docs/` directory. There is no precomputed file index; the corpora are intended for direct search.

## Important

Your training data about Sui, Move, Walrus, Seal, the `@mysten/*` TypeScript SDK, and the Sui Prover is likely outdated. Always search and read these docs before generating code in these ecosystems.
